clients.name: Kadai and Co
clients.knowledge_base: Kadai and Co is a Bengaluru fast-casual chain built around coastal Karnataka recipes and single-origin spices. Founder-led, five outlets, known for its ghee-roast formats and a small-batch pantry line.

clients.name: Verandah Stays
clients.knowledge_base: Verandah Stays runs restored heritage homestays across Bengaluru and the Western Ghats, with a focus on slow travel, regional food, and low-impact operations.

campaigns.name: Monsoon Menu Launch
campaigns.story_angle: Kadai and Co is reviving forgotten monsoon-season coastal recipes, backed by a study of seasonal ordering patterns across Bengaluru delivery data.
campaigns.data_study_title: How Bengaluru eats through the monsoon
campaigns.data_study_summary: Analysis of three years of seasonal ordering shows a clear shift toward warm, spice-forward coastal dishes between June and September.

campaigns.name: Heritage Stays Winter Preview
campaigns.story_angle: Verandah Stays is opening two restored Western Ghats homestays for the winter season, framed by post-monsoon slow-travel demand near Bengaluru.
campaigns.data_study_title: Where Bengaluru travels when the city slows down
campaigns.data_study_summary: Early booking data points to a post-monsoon rise in short heritage stays within a four-hour drive of the city.

pitches.subject: Bengaluru is ordering warmer and spicier in the rain
pitches.body:
Monsoon-season orders for warm coastal dishes rose 34 percent over three years across Bengaluru delivery data.

Hi Manish, Kadai and Co is reviving forgotten monsoon coastal recipes and the ordering data backs the trend. Happy to share the full study and a founder interview, exclusive to you first.

Worth a look?
[sign-off]

pitches.subject: The quiet return of the Western Ghats heritage stay
pitches.body:
Short heritage stays within a four-hour drive of Bengaluru are booking out earlier each post-monsoon season.

Hi Harsha, Verandah Stays is opening two restored Western Ghats homestays this winter and the early booking data backs the slow-travel shift. Happy to share the numbers and arrange a stay.

Would this fit an upcoming travel feature?
[sign-off]

monitor_events.title: Panel source wanted on QSR delivery margins
monitor_events.summary: Trade panel needs an operator to speak to delivery commissions and menu engineering.
monitor_events.draft_response: Kadai and Co has held delivery margins steady by keeping a tight, high-velocity menu and pricing for the format rather than the dining room. Happy to share specifics on the record.
